description: launchPublishedWorkflowRun always launches on Temporal: delete isTemporalPollingEnabled() and the engine ternary; remove the db fallback branch
StartRunParams loses its engine field; WorkflowRuntimeV2.startRun writes engine='temporal' unconditionally
WorkflowRunRecord engine type documents 'db' as read-only historical; no writer can produce it
WorkflowRuntimeV2TemporalWorker uses the contract task-queue constant; env override removed
WORKFLOW_RUNTIME_V2_TEMPORAL_TASK_QUEUE removed from compose files and worker startup logging
workflow-worker index.ts starts the Temporal worker unconditionally; WORKFLOW_RUNTIME_V2_ENABLE_TEMPORAL_POLLING deleted
workflow-worker index.ts no longer references the DB poller; WORKFLOW_RUNTIME_V2_ENABLE_DB_POLLING deleted
Delete services/workflow-worker/src/v2/WorkflowRuntimeV2Worker.ts
Delete shared/workflow/workers/WorkflowRuntimeV2Worker.ts and its export from shared/workflow/workers/index.ts
workflow_data_store expiry sweep extracted to a standalone interval module started by workflow-worker index.ts
Worker health server reports the new worker set (temporal, eventStream, dataStoreSweep); dbPolling slot removed
Delete retryWorkflowRunAction and POST /api/workflow-runs/[runId]/retry
Delete legacy resumeWorkflowRunAction and POST /api/workflow-runs/[runId]/resume
Delete requeueWorkflowRunEventWaitAction and POST /api/workflow-runs/[runId]/requeue
Delete assertLegacyRunControlSupported and throwUnsupportedTemporalRunControlAction
cancelWorkflowRunAction always cancels via Temporal; db status-mutation branch removed
resumeWorkflowRunFromQuotaPauseAction always signals Temporal quota resume; executeRun else-branch removed
submitWorkflowEventAction routes all matched runs to Temporal signals; engine guard removed
WorkflowRuntimeV2EventStreamWorker signals all matched runs; engine !== 'temporal' skip removed
workflowQuotaResumeScanHandler always signals Temporal; executeRun else-branch removed
Delete the never-invoked executeWorkflowRuntimeV2Run Temporal activity
Delete WorkflowRuntimeV2.executeRun and its private step/action executor helpers (loadEnvelope, persistSnapshot, executor loop)
Delete WorkflowRuntimeV2.acquireRunnableRun
Delete WorkflowRuntimeV2.resumeRunFromEvent and resumeRunFromTimeout
startRun remains functional for launcher and startWorkflowRuntimeV2ChildRun after interpreter deletion (compile + runtime verified)
WorkflowRunSnapshotModelV2 and snapshot reads (run studio, export, cleanup) remain working for historical runs
Remove Retry button and handleRetry from WorkflowRunDetailsPanel
Remove Resume button and handleResume (legacy) from WorkflowRunDetailsPanel
Remove Requeue Event button and handleRequeue from WorkflowRunDetailsPanel
Replay sends payload only when the operator edited the pre-filled JSON; unedited replay omits payload so the server uses original unredacted input_json
Replay success navigates to the new run's page
Run details panel shows queued-waiting-for-worker banner when status=RUNNING, zero steps, started_at older than 60s
Migration finalizes stranded non-Temporal runs: CANCELED + completed_at + error_json note; open workflow_run_waits resolved; terminal rows untouched
Temporal services merged into docker-compose.ee.yaml; docker-compose.temporal.ee.yaml deleted
docker-compose.playwright-workflow-deps.yml runs the Temporal stack instead of DB polling
All WORKFLOW_RUNTIME_V2_ENABLE_* references removed from compose files and env examples
Delete workflowEngineReferenceWorkflows.db.test.ts
workflowRuntimeV2.e2e.test.ts rewritten to drive the Temporal path; DB-poller-driven cases removed
workflowRuntimeV2.control.integration.test.ts: DB-engine setup/cases removed; Temporal control cases retained and passing
workflowRuntimeV2.publish.integration.test.ts rewritten without executeRun/acquireRunnableRun
workflowRunLauncher unit tests drop flag-toggling cases; assert always-temporal launch
workflow-worker index.startup.test.ts drops DB-polling cases; asserts unconditional Temporal worker start
workflowQuotaResumeScanHandler unit tests updated for signal-only path
HARD_CUTOVER_SUPPORT_POSTURE.md and related cutover docs updated to reflect engine removal
